name: Andrew Dice Clay
bio: Andrew Dice Clay is an American stand-up comedian and actor who rose to fame in the late 1980s with a brash, deliberately offensive persona, The Diceman, built around dirty nursery rhymes and an exaggerated macho swagger. In 1990 he became the first comedian to sell out Madison Square Garden for two consecutive nights, footage used in his concert film Dice Rules.

timeline.ev: Breakout set on Rodney Dangerfields HBO young-comedians special
First comedian to sell out Madison Square Garden two nights running

accolades: First stand-up comedian to sell out Madison Square Garden two consecutive nights (1990)
SAG Award nomination as part of the A Star Is Born cast (2018)

bits.yt_title: Rodney Dangerfield Introduces the World to the Diceman (1987)
